_meta.name: English (Canada)
_meta.review_note: All strings reviewed by tech-writer and labour lawyer before any production launch (plan §13 item E). OHSA / s.50 / s.43 / s.51 wording in particular.
_meta.placeholders: Variables use {name} syntax; integers/dates locale-format at render time.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again, or contact your worker co-chair if the problem continues.
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
errors.permission: You don't have permission to do this. If you think you should, contact your worker co-chair.
errors.session_expired: Your session has ended. Sign in again to continue.
errors.rate_limit: You've done this too many times. Try again in {minutes} minutes.
errors.crypto: Could not decrypt the data on this device. Try locking and signing in again. If this keeps happening, your device may have been tampered with — contact your worker co-chair.
errors.integrity_fail: The data on this device could not be verified. This entry may have been tampered with and was not saved. Please re-enter it.

device.heading: Use a personal device only
device.body: If you are reading this on a phone or laptop your employer owns, pays for, or manages, your employer may be able to read what you do here. Stop. Install on a personal phone or laptop and start again.
device.continue: This is a personal device — continue
device.stop: Stop — I'll switch to a personal device
device.stop_confirm_body: You can come back any time on a personal device.

hosting.heading: Where your data lives
hosting.body: Your committee's data is stored on Supabase, a company based in the US that runs the servers in Canada (ca-central-1). Two things to know: (1) the worker-side content — concerns, reprisal entries, minutes drafts — is encrypted on your device before it leaves, so Supabase only ever sees scrambled bytes. (2) US legal process could in principle reach the company, but what they would get back is the same scrambled bytes.

browser.unsupported_body: The JHSC App needs a recent version of Chrome, Edge, Firefox, or Safari to set up passkeys safely. Update your browser or use a different one on this device and try again.

passkey.heading: Set up your passkey
passkey.explainer: A passkey is a way to sign in without a password. It lives on this device and uses your fingerprint, face, or device PIN to confirm it's you. There is no password to leak or guess.
passkey.failed_body: Try again. If your device doesn't support passkeys, use a different personal device.

recovery.heading: Your recovery sheet
recovery.body: If you lose this device AND your passkey, the only way back into your account is the recovery passphrase below. There is no admin who can reset it. Print this sheet and store it somewhere safe — not at work.
recovery.copy_warning: Copying is not a substitute for printing. The clipboard is not secure.

show_again.label: Press and hold to show the passphrase again
show_again.helper: Anyone who can see this screen can read the passphrase. Hold the button down for a moment to reveal it; release to hide. You can do this three times per enrollment — after that, restart enrollment to see it again.
show_again.helper_capped: You've used all three reveals in this enrollment. To see the passphrase again, restart enrollment from the start of the recovery step.

verify.heading: Type the passphrase back to confirm
verify.helper: Type the words exactly as printed, separated by spaces.
verify.wrong_body: Check the printed sheet and try again. {attempts_left} attempts left.
verify.exhausted_body: We'll show the passphrase again so you can re-verify.

recovery.title: JHSC App — Recovery sheet for {display_name}
recovery.warning: If anyone has this sheet, they can recover your account on a new device. Treat it like a key. Do not store it at work.

intake.heading: Log a concern
intake.subheading: Recorded by you on behalf of a worker. Anonymous by default.

anon.helper_on: The original worker's name is not stored. Only what you type in the body is.
anon.helper_off: You are about to record a worker's name.

named.advisory_heading: About to save a worker's name
named.advisory_body: The source name will be encrypted under the committee key. Every active committee member can see it. You cannot un-name it once you save.

saved.heading: Concern logged
saved.summary_named: Saved with a named source. Visible to all active committee members.

empty.heading: No concerns logged yet
empty.body: When a worker raises something, log it here. The intake form encrypts the body on this device before saving.

list.row_named_label: Named source — tap to reveal name

empty.heading: No reprisal entries logged
empty.body: A reprisal entry records suspected retaliation against a worker for raising a health-and-safety concern. OHSA s.50 protects workers from this. Entries are the highest sensitivity tier in this app.

create.heading: Log a reprisal entry
create.subheading: Highest sensitivity. Your name will be recorded as the author. The body is encrypted on this device.

field.title: Title
field.passphrase: Set a passphrase for this entry

passphrase.helper: This passphrase is a friction layer to view the entry later. The actual encryption uses your passkey-derived keys.

consent.heading: Before you log a reprisal
consent.lead: A reprisal entry is the most sensitive record this app holds. Here is exactly what happens when you submit it.
consent.bullet_encrypted: What is sealed and only readable by the committee: the entry body, any names, dates, witnesses, and any details you write or attach. These are locked to the committee key and never readable by the employer, the hosting provider, or anyone outside the committee.
consent.bullet_visible: What other active committee members will see in the recent-activity feed: that a reprisal entry exists, when it was created (to the nearest hour), and the reprisal entry's ID. They will NOT see who created it. Forensic review can identify the author only after a two-member committee approval, the same way reprisal entries are deleted.
consent.bullet_why: Why other members see the entry exists: to deter anyone — including a co-opted committee member — from quietly logging or reading reprisal entries on someone else's behalf. The committee acts as a check on itself.
consent.bullet_not_visible: What other members will NOT see: your name, your pseudonym, the content of the entry, or any worker named in the entry.
consent.ohsa_reminder: OHSA s.50 reminder: reprisal against you for using this app is itself an OHSA offence. The committee can pursue a s.50 complaint to the Ontario Labour Relations Board.
consent.checkbox_label: I understand what other committee members will see, and I want to submit this entry.

passphrase.heading: Enter the passphrase for this entry
passphrase.label: Passphrase
passphrase.helper: This is a friction layer. The entry is also protected by your passkey-derived keys.
passphrase.exhausted_body: This attempt has been logged. Wait before trying again.

read.your_read_announce: Your read of this reprisal entry was logged at {timestamp} and other members will be notified.

fourEyes.heading: This change needs a second committee member's approval
fourEyes.body: Status changes on reprisal entries require two active committee members. Propose the change; another member will see it in their sensitive-activity feed and approve.
fourEyes.self_approve_denied_heading: You can't approve your own proposal
fourEyes.self_approve_denied_body: Another active member must approve. This is by design.

page.title: Recent sensitive activity
page.subtitle: Reads of reprisal entries, exports to the employer co-chair, and other sensitive events from across the committee.

empty.heading: No recent sensitive activity
empty.body: When another member reads a reprisal entry or exports anything to the employer co-chair, you will see it here.

muted.banner: Notification pop-ups paused. The feed still updates. Audit logging is unaffected.

error.load_failed: Unable to load recent activity. Retry.

reauth.heading: Confirm with your passkey to continue
reauth.body: Exports leave the worker side. Your current session is not enough — you need to confirm with your passkey now.
reauth.failed_body: Try again, or cancel and start over.

fields.heading: These fields will leave the worker side
fields.subheading: This is the entire allowlist. Anything not listed here is not included.

recipient.label: Recipient: Employer co-chair (manual delivery — you will send the file yourself).

concern_flag.heading: This export includes items derived from worker concerns
concern_flag.body: Some items being exported came from worker concerns logged on the worker side. Review the originating concerns below before confirming.
concern_flag.confirm_checkbox: I have reviewed the concern-derived items.

confirm.disabled_hint: Tick the confirmation box above to enable.

exported.heading: Export ready
exported.notified_label: Other members will be notified within 60 seconds.

empty.heading: Nothing to export yet
empty.body: There are no finalized items to export. Finalize the document first.

error.integrity_body: The list of fields about to be exported does not match the renderer. The export was cancelled and an audit row was written. Try again — if this keeps happening, contact the worker co-chair.

capture.heading: Photo capture
capture.advisory_inline: GPS removed automatically. Enter location as text or pick from the list.

preview.heading: Review before attaching
preview.gps_advisory: All location and metadata has been removed from this photo. The location below — if you enter it — is what will be saved.

location.label: Location (optional, free text)
location.select_label: Or pick from the location list
location.placeholder: e.g. South dock, line 3, near the hydraulic press

status.upload_failed: Upload failed — will retry on next sync
status.integrity_failed_body: This entry could not be verified and was not saved. A malicious extension may have modified the queue. Please re-take and re-enter.

partial.heading: {succeeded} synced, {failed} failed verification
partial.body: These entries could not be verified and were not saved. Open the list to re-enter them.

lock.heading: Locked — confirm it's you to continue
lock.body: Your committee data is protected and was cleared from memory.

panic.heading: Wipe this device's data
panic.body: This will remove from this device: the encrypted local store, your current session, and cached settings. It does NOT remove data from the server — other devices and the committee still have their access. You cannot undo this on this device.
panic.complete_body: Sign in again to continue, or close this tab to leave the app.

page.title: Sessions on this account
page.subtitle: Other devices where you are signed in. Revoke any that you don't recognize.

revoke_all.confirm_body: All sessions other than this device will be signed out. This is immediate.

current_revoke.confirm_body: You will be signed out of this device. You can sign back in with your passkey.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.intro: Use the passkey on this device to sign in to JHSC.
signIn.already_signed_in: You're already signed in on this device.

landing.subtitle: Health and safety, for the people doing the work.

new_device.heading: New device
new_device.description: Set up this device for the first time. You'll enrol a passkey and store a recovery passphrase.

returning_device.heading: Already enrolled
returning_device.description: Sign in with the passkey on this device.

signed_in.heading: Welcome back
signed_in.description: You're already signed in on this device.

signOut.heading: Session
signOut.intro: Sign out on this device. The server-side session expires within a few minutes; for immediate device cleanup, use Wipe this device's data below.
signOut.signed_out: Signed out. You can sign back in with your passkey.

device_data.heading: Device data
device_data.intro_before_emphasis: Erase the encrypted local store, your current sign-in, and queued entries on this device. This does
device_data.intro_after_emphasis: sign you out on the server or other devices.

page.title: Audit log
page.subtitle: Every action on the worker side. Hash-chained and tamper-evident.

integrity.failed_body: The audit log appears to have been tampered with. Contact the worker co-chair immediately.
integrity.never_body: The first daily integrity check will run shortly.

action.reprisal.delete.propose: Proposed deletion of a reprisal entry
action.reprisal.delete.approve: Approved deletion of a reprisal entry
action.sensitive.access_attempt: Attempted to view a sensitive entry
action.export.minutes: Exported finalized minutes to employer co-chair
action.export.recommendation: Exported a recommendation to employer co-chair
action.export.integrity_fail: Export integrity check failed and was cancelled
action.identity_keypair.created: Created the keys this device uses to sign in
action.committee_data_key.wrapped_for_member: Granted a member access to the committee key
action.committee_data_key.unwrap: Unlocked the committee's shared data for this session
action.client.identity_selftest_fail: Identity-key self-test failed on a device
action.client.cache_policy_violation: Blocked a stale response from being shown — possible tampering
action.queue.integrity_fail: An offline-queued entry failed verification and was rejected

empty.heading: No inspections yet
empty.body: Monthly workplace inspections are an OHSA s.9(26) duty. Start a new one when you walk the floor.

concern_flag.detected: This export includes items derived from worker concerns. Review carefully.

export.complete: Export ready. PDF is downloaded. Audit row {audit_id} recorded.
export.post_export_notification: Other committee members are being notified of this export.

read.logged: Your read of this reprisal entry was logged at {timestamp} and other members will be notified.

fourEyes.proposed: Change proposed. Awaiting approval from another committee member.

concern.anonymous_on: Anonymous source, on. Press to switch off and record a name.
concern.anonymous_off: Named source, on. Press to switch back to anonymous.
concern.advisory_named: About to save a worker's name. The name will be encrypted but every active committee member can see it.

lock.engaged: Application locked. Sign in again to continue.

panic.complete: Local data wiped from this device.

audit.integrity_fail: Audit log integrity check failed. Contact the worker co-chair.

photo.captured: Photo captured. Review and add a location if you want one.
photo.integrity_fail: A photo could not be verified and was rejected. Please re-take it.

sensitive_feed.muted: Sensitive-activity pop-ups paused. The feed still updates.

page.title: Document library
page.subtitle: Quick reference: OHSA, regulations, committee terms of reference.

empty.heading: No documents yet
empty.body: Reference documents will appear here once they are published.
